# Nivaasos

> Nivaasos is a community operations and transparency platform that helps
> apartment communities manage maintenance fees, expenses, payments,
> maintenance requests, work orders, documents, and resident communication
> in one secure system. Official website: https://nivaasos.com

Product status (as of July 2026): responsive web application, available to
communities via onboarding conversation and demo. Native Android and iOS
apps are planned but not yet available in application stores. Launch market:
Hyderabad, India. Nivaasos is not a bank, payment institution, or auditor.

Private community data (financials, residents, documents) lives in the
separate authenticated application and is never available on this website
or to crawlers.

## Key pages

- [Product overview](https://nivaasos.com/product): what Nivaasos is and why
- [Features](https://nivaasos.com/features): complete capability list
- [Community accounting](https://nivaasos.com/community-accounting): fees, expenses, ledgers, reserve funds
- [Maintenance management](https://nivaasos.com/maintenance-management): requests → work orders → expenses
- [Resident portal](https://nivaasos.com/resident-portal): what residents see and do
- [How it works](https://nivaasos.com/how-it-works): onboarding in five steps
- [Product facts](https://nivaasos.com/product-facts): concise verifiable facts, kept current
- [FAQ](https://nivaasos.com/faq): direct answers to common questions
- [Security](https://nivaasos.com/security): how community data is protected
- [Contact](https://nivaasos.com/contact): how to reach the team
- [Request a demo](https://nivaasos.com/request-demo)

## Audiences

- [Apartment communities](https://nivaasos.com/apartment-communities)
- [Property managers](https://nivaasos.com/property-managers)
- [NRI property owners](https://nivaasos.com/nri-property-owners)
